---
title: "Research"
---

A short overview paragraph: what unifies the lab's work, in plain language.

## Research area one

Two to four sentences on this line of work: the question, the approach, and a
representative result or ongoing project. Add a figure with
`![caption](assets/figure.png)` if you have one.

## Research area two

Same structure as above.

## Research area three

Same structure as above. Delete or add sections as needed — each `##` heading
becomes an entry in this page's structure.
